name: medical clinics processing 50–100 invoices/month tool
description: For medical clinics processing 50–100 invoices/month, inefficient matching causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of patient records and insurance payments.
problem_solved: Inefficient matching of patient records with insurance payments
